description: Per-artifact-type file-scan patterns used by CLIArtifactRecovery when a CLI dev session completes but parseResponse returns no fenced artifact. Each entry tells the recovery scanner which relative paths to check in the workDir and what content markers validate a hit. Add a new artifact type by appending an entry — no Swift rebuild needed.

miniApp.notes: Mini-app = single-page HTML doc. Accept any file with common HTML markers.

macOSApp.notes: macOS Swift project. Find all .swift + Package.swift, validate with Swift symbol presence.

unityGame.notes: Unity C# files. No strict marker — any .cs file present counts.

pythonMicroservice.notes: Python service. Requires at least one .py file + Python-shape content.
